name: Tilin {The Pink Valley DOOM mod}
description:
I changed the image, lmk what yall think

Played the Pink Valley DOOM mod some time ago and thought it is peak.

You should play it first to avoid spoilers, you just need UZDoom, Doom 2 (which you can get pretty easily on Archive.org) and the mod itself, which is on ModDB.

(keep in mind that this bot has most of my headcanons)

UPDATE 1:

Added more official-ish lore to Tilin

Added 3 new starting messages

Added Psycho Christian (along with my headcanons)

UPDATE 2:

Finished the WIP starting message

Added weapon definitions
